name: com.nkstudio.uitk-effects
description:
UI Toolkit custom post-processing filters and gradient material.

▪ Drop Shadow / Inner Shadow / Outer Glow / Outline filters (FilterFunctionDefinition assets)
▪ Gradient material for -unity-material, with angle and step (posterize) control
▪ Asset-only: no runtime C# required

samples.description: Demonstrates shadows, outline, and gradient effects with UI Toolkit.
